PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?coach WHERE {
  ?game wdt:P1492 wd:Q3337331 ; wdt:P585 ?date ; wdt:P550 wd:Q6982660 ; wdt:P550 ?opponent .
  FILTER(?opponent != wd:Q6982660)
  .
  FILTER(year(?date) = 1969)
  .
  ?opponent wdt:P57 ?coach .
}
LIMIT 1
